---
title: "Bulk Density Sampling"
---

Bulk density sampling uses volumetric soil cores or equivalent undisturbed sampling approaches to estimate how much dry soil mass is contained in a given volume.

| Item | Description |
|---|---|
| **What it is** | A volumetric sampling method for undisturbed soil. |
| **Main purpose** | To support structure, compaction, and stock-related interpretation. |
| **Where used** | Field and laboratory |
| **Typical users** | Researchers, technicians, advisors |
| **Typical outputs** | Bulk density values and support for stock calculations |

## Main target variables

- bulk density,
- support for stock calculations,
- support for compaction and structure-related interpretation.

## Descriptor groups supported

- compaction,
- structure,
- soil organic carbon stock interpretation,
- and deeper reference assessment.
